title: lonicera nummulariifolia subsp. occidentalis
intro: Lonicera nummulariifolia subsp. occidentalis, commonly known as the western box honeysuckle, is a species of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. It is used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties, providing relief and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Lonicera nummulariifolia subsp. occidentalis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
